## 🛰️ Developer Context
**Workflow Area**: [IDD / CI-CD / Steering Docs / Rust Implementation]
**Friction Level**: [Low / Medium / High]

## 🏗️ Synthesis & Workflow
- **IDD Efficiency**: [Is the Intent -> Synthesis loop effective?]
- **Steering Clarity**: [Are the steering files in `specs/steering/` providing enough context?]
- **CI Performance**: [Is the `cd compiler && just` loop fast enough for 'Titanium' velocity?]

## 🛠️ Code Aesthetic
- **Rank Ω Alignment**: [Are we meeting the 85% coverage and Clippy silence gates without pain?]
- **Refactoring Needs**: [Are there any modular atoms that need better SRP (Single Responsibility)?]

## 🏁 Recommendations for "Cognitive Flow"
[How can we make development more effortless for humans and agents?]
